Corn___Common_rust_.treatment: Apply Mancozeb 2g/L or Propiconazole 1ml/L. Remove heavily infected leaves. Ensure proper plant spacing for air circulation.

Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight.treatment: Spray Azoxystrobin 1ml/L at first sign. Avoid overhead irrigation. Use resistant hybrids in next season.

Corn___Gray_Leaf_Spot.treatment: Apply Trifloxystrobin + Propiconazole fungicide. Improve field drainage. Rotate crops with non-host plants.

Corn___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Continue regular monitoring every 7 days. Maintain balanced NPK fertilization.

Tomato___Early_blight.treatment: Spray Chlorothalonil 2g/L every 7-10 days. Remove infected lower leaves. Apply organic mulch to prevent soil splash.

Tomato___Late_blight.treatment: Immediately spray Metalaxyl + Mancozeb 2.5g/L. Remove and destroy infected plants. Do NOT compost infected material.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.treatment: Reduce humidity. Apply Copper oxychloride 3g/L. Prune lower leaves for better air flow.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.treatment: Apply Mancozeb or Chlorothalonil 2g/L. Remove infected leaves. Avoid wetting foliage during irrigation.

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.treatment: Spray neem oil 5ml/L or Abamectin 0.5ml/L. Increase irrigation to reduce mite pressure. Release predatory mites.

Tomato___Target_Spot.treatment: Apply Azoxystrobin or Boscalid fungicide. Improve air circulation. Avoid dense planting.

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.treatment: No cure — remove infected plants immediately. Control whitefly vector with Imidacloprid 0.3ml/L. Use virus-resistant varieties.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.treatment: Remove infected plants. Disinfect tools with bleach. Control aphid vectors. Plant resistant varieties next season.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Spray Copper hydroxide 3g/L. Avoid working in field when wet. Use certified disease-free seeds.

Tomato___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Continue weekly scouting. Maintain consistent watering and fertilization schedule.

Potato___Early_blight.treatment: Apply Mancozeb 2.5g/L every 7 days. Ensure adequate potassium levels. Remove and destroy infected debris after harvest.

Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Spray Metalaxyl 2g/L immediately. Destroy infected tubers. Avoid irrigating in late evening. This spreads very fast — alert nearby farmers.

Potato___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Monitor for late blight symptoms especially during humid weather.

Rice___Leaf_scald.treatment: Apply Tricyclazole 0.6g/L. Avoid excessive nitrogen. Drain field periodically.

Rice___Brown_spot.treatment: Spray Propiconazole 1ml/L. Apply potassium fertilizer. Use healthy certified seeds next season.

Rice___Hispa.treatment: Apply Chlorpyrifos 2ml/L or Monocrotophos 1.5ml/L. Clip and destroy affected leaf tips.

Rice___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Maintain optimal water levels and monitor for stem borer weekly.

Wheat___Leaf_rust.treatment: Apply Propiconazole 1ml/L at booting stage. Use rust-resistant varieties. Avoid late sowing.

Wheat___Yellow_rust.treatment: Spray Tebuconazole 1ml/L immediately. Apply early morning. Alert neighbors — yellow rust spreads via wind very fast.

Wheat___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Monitor for rust symptoms at flag leaf stage.

Cotton___Bacterial_blight.treatment: Spray Streptomycin Sulphate 0.5g/L + Copper oxychloride 3g/L. Use disease-free certified seeds. Avoid working in wet conditions.

Cotton___Curl_Virus.treatment: Remove and destroy infected plants. Control whitefly with Thiamethoxam 0.3g/L. Plant CLCuV-tolerant varieties.

Cotton___Fusarium_wilt.treatment: No effective chemical cure once infected. Drench soil with Carbendazim 1g/L. Use wilt-resistant varieties. Solarize soil in off-season.

Cotton___healthy.treatment: Crop looks healthy. Monitor for bollworm and whitefly weekly. Install pheromone traps.

Grape___Black_rot.treatment: Apply Myclobutanil or Mancozeb every 7-10 days from budbreak. Remove mummified fruits. Prune for open canopy.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: Remove and destroy infected wood. Apply Sodium arsenite (where legal) or Fosetyl-Al. Protect pruning wounds with paste.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.treatment: Spray Copper fungicide 3g/L. Improve canopy ventilation. Avoid overhead irrigation.

Grape___healthy.treatment: Vines look healthy. Maintain regular pruning schedule and monitor for downy mildew after rains.

Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply Captan 2g/L or Myclobutanil 1ml/L at green tip stage. Rake and destroy fallen leaves.

Apple___Black_rot.treatment: Prune and destroy infected branches. Apply Captan or Thiophanate-methyl. Remove mummified fruits from tree.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Spray Myclobutanil 1ml/L from pink bud stage every 7-10 days. Remove nearby juniper/cedar trees if possible.

Apple___healthy.treatment: Tree looks healthy. Continue dormant oil spray in winter. Monitor for codling moth and fire blight.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.treatment: Apply Captan 2g/L. Remove infected leaves. Avoid overhead watering. Ensure good drainage.

Strawberry___healthy.treatment: Plants look healthy. Monitor for spider mites and gray mold especially during fruiting.
